# Unit Tests for snake_to_camel

```python
import pytest
from your_module import snake_to_camel  # Replace with actual module name


class TestSnakeToCamel:
    """Test suite for snake_to_camel function."""

    # Happy path tests
    def test_simple_snake_case(self):
        """Test conversion of simple snake_case string."""
        assert snake_to_camel("hello_world") == "helloWorld"

    def test_multiple_underscores(self):
        """Test conversion with multiple underscores."""
        assert snake_to_camel("hello_world_foo") == "helloWorldFoo"

    def test_single_word_no_underscore(self):
        """Test string with no underscores."""
        assert snake_to_camel("hello") == "hello"

    def test_two_letter_words(self):
        """Test conversion with two-letter words."""
        assert snake_to_camel("is_ok") == "isOk"

    def test_single_character_words(self):
        """Test conversion with single character words."""
        assert snake_to_camel("a_b_c") == "aBC"

    def test_already_camel_case_with_underscores(self):
        """Test string that looks like camelCase but has underscores."""
        assert snake_to_camel("hello_World") == "helloWorld"

    # Edge cases
    def test_empty_string(self):
        """Test with empty string."""
        assert snake_to_camel("") == ""

    def test_single_character(self):
        """Test with single character."""
        assert snake_to_camel("a") == "a"

    def test_leading_underscore(self):
        """Test with leading underscore."""
        assert snake_to_camel("_hello_world") == "_HelloWorld"

    def test_trailing_underscore(self):
        """Test with trailing underscore."""
        assert snake_to_camel("hello_world_") == "helloWorld"

    def test_consecutive_underscores(self):
        """Test with consecutive underscores."""
        assert snake_to_camel("hello__world") == "helloWorld"

    def test_only_underscores(self):
        """Test with only underscores."""
        assert snake_to_camel("___") == ""

    def test_uppercase_letters(self):
        """Test with uppercase letters in input."""
        assert snake_to_camel("HELLO_WORLD") == "HELLOWorld"

    def test_mixed_case_input(self):
        """Test with mixed case input."""
        assert snake_to_camel("Hello_World_Foo") == "HelloWorldFoo"

    def test_numbers_in_string(self):
        """Test with numbers in the string."""
        assert snake_to_camel("hello_world_123") == "helloWorld123"

    def test_numbers_at_start_of_word(self):
        """Test with numbers at the start of words."""
        assert snake_to_camel("hello_2world") == "hello2world"

    # Error cases / Type validation
    def test_none_input(self):
        """Test with None input."""
        with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
            snake_to_camel(None)

    def test_integer_input(self):
        """Test with integer input."""
        with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
            snake_to_camel(123)

    def test_list_input(self):
        """Test with list input."""
        with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
            snake_to_camel(["hello", "world"])

    def test_dict_input(self):
        """Test with dictionary input."""
        with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
            snake_to_camel({"key": "value"})

    # Additional edge cases
    def test_special_characters(self):
        """Test with special characters."""
        assert snake_to_camel("hello_world!") == "helloWorld!"

    def test
